description: Draft + critique → revised brief for educator→poet revision round

{history_ctx}{user_ctx}Construct a COMPACT revised generation brief (~300 tokens) for the next draft. The poet executes briefs and tight patches well; it was rhyme- and revision-trained.

Requirements:
- Carry forward any unchanged parts of the form contract (scheme, line count, stanza shape). If rhyme or meter must be fixed, restate the target scheme or stress pattern explicitly.
- Map each major critique point to a concrete revision target (line numbers, stanzas, or end-words).
- Separate must-fix (form/rhyme breaks, broken sense) from should-improve (voice, image).
- Do not ask for a full rewrite unless the draft is unsalvageable; prefer surgical instructions.
- Angle, clichés to avoid, imagery domain, form — updated only where the critique demands. No flourish, no draft poem.
